message.content:
I’m DeepSeek, created by DeepSeek Company! 😊 I’m an AI assistant specialized in natural language understanding, reasoning, and helping users with various tasks like answering questions, writing, analysis, coding assistance, and much more.

I’m a text-based model that can process uploaded files (images, PDFs, Word docs, Excel sheets, PowerPoint presentations, etc.) and extract text information from them. I support a 128K context window, and I’m completely free to use!

If you have any questions or need help with something, just let me know
